cards.title: Eligibility
cards.body: Not every offer needs to appear in every path. Eligibility should depend on channel settings, commercial terms, and approved use case.

cards.title: Search result
cards.body: A platform search result should expose enough information for a user to choose the right stay path without misrepresenting the hotel offer.

items.question: What is supply eligibility?
items.answer: It is the rule set that decides which hotel inventory and offers can appear in a given platform or Partner path.

items.question: Is this endpoint documentation?
items.answer: This is a concept page. Endpoint references should be added after API approval.

items.question: Where does booking happen?
items.answer: Selected supply should resolve into an approved Booking Engine or platform booking path.

fields.heading: Ready to build with Wink?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
